subject: Review maven hierarchy to fix stage-release
commit_message:
Review maven hierarchy to fix stage-release

This change is to fix stage-release whose maven goal
versions:update-child-modules is not updating child module
versions as expected.

See sub-task CPS-239 of story CPS-175 for more details.

Issue-ID: CPS-175
Signed-off-by: Bruno Sakoto <bruno.sakoto@bell.ca>
Change-Id: I93b4077380213118f15d5879f9768ce8699176bd

Patch Set 2:

it completely changes the hierarchy 
and making the modules dependent on each other through aggregator
what we tried to avoid iitially

did we try using an option -DprocessAllModules ?
the approach is described here
https://stackoverflow.com/questions/5726291/updating-version-numbers-of-modules-in-a-multi-module-maven-project/49246337#49246337

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

I suspect this more about the command used than about hierarchy, I will check the limitation of the plugin to achieve it
